claim: Fine-tuning GPT-4o achieves state-of-the-art performance on the software engineering verified benchmark, with significant performance gains and cost savings compared to base models
actionable: Measure your fine-tuning performance against established benchmarks to validate ROI before committing training resources
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: Fine-tuning reduces token usage dramatically—a 14K token prompt engineered approach can be replaced with a ~10-100 token fine-tuned example, achieving massive savings
actionable: When token costs become a bottleneck, collect 50-hundreds of quality examples and fine-tune rather than expanding your prompt engineering
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: Fine-tuning is the last resort after exhausting all prompt engineering tricks (examples, XML formatting, structured outputs, chaining, fusion chains)
actionable: Try prompt engineering and advanced chaining strategies first; only fine-tune when all other techniques fail to achieve target accuracy
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: Vision Grid tool uses fine-tuned GPT-4o to expand short user prompts (5-7 words) into rich, detailed image prompts for Flux models
actionable: Apply expansion prompts to amplify user intent: user input → fine-tuned expansion → detail-rich output → downstream model
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: Domain-specific fine-tuning is justified when you handle large, complex tasks specific to your use case that cannot be solved by prompt engineering alone
actionable: Assess whether your task is domain-specific enough (e.g., specialized prompt formats, repeating patterns) to justify fine-tuning investment
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: Fine-tuning requires 50-hundreds of high-quality training examples; the quality and relevance of examples is more critical than quantity
actionable: Before fine-tuning, audit your training data for quality and domain relevance; garbage data will produce garbage models
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX Image Prompts

claim: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini all support fine-tuning; Claude 3.5 Sonnet fine-tuning and Gemini Flash fine-tuning are available
actionable: Check current provider documentation for latest fine-tuning support; don't assume older information reflects current capabilities
source_title: Why fine-tune LLMs? GPT-4o fine-tune for PERFECT FLUX IMAGE Prompts
